items.title: Ayatollah Khamenei's iron grip on power in Iran
items.dek: The supreme leader of Iran embraced hardline policies against increasing pressure for reform.

items.title: Where have Nepal's 'nepo kids' gone as corruption takes centre stage in election?
items.dek: The excess of politicians' children was front and centre of the anger that drove protests that toppled the government last year.
items.body: The excess of politicians' children was front and centre of the anger that drove protests that toppled the government last year.
